misc: Primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event.
biography: Toni, a familiar and respected figure at Hirsala Golf, is more than just a competitor; he is the primary organizer behind the Hector Trophée itself. Without Toni's tireless effort, this prestigious tournament would simply not exist.

With twelve past appearances, Toni is a seasoned veteran of the Hector Trophée, demonstrating a consistent commitment to the event and a deep understanding of its unique challenges. His experience is undeniable, and his presence adds a layer of gravitas to the competition.

Toni's skill and dedication have translated into tangible success. He has claimed the coveted Hector Trophée on three occasions, a testament to his ability to forge strong partnerships and perform under pressure. Furthermore, he has twice earned the Victor Trophy, showcasing his individual prowess on the course.

As Toni prepares for his thirteenth appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026, all eyes will be on him. Can he leverage his experience and organizational insight to capture another title? Only time will tell, but one thing is certain: Toni will be a force to be reckoned with.
